name: compound-orchestrator
description: Installs and enforces a cross-platform compound engineering loop for coding, writing, research, and documentation projects.

interface.shortDescription: Enforce plan, review, README, and compounding loops across agents.
interface.longDescription: Compound Orchestrator installs shared project memory, workflow commands, review rubrics, ownership claims, README maintenance, and cross-platform verification gates so coding and writing tasks leave durable knowledge for the next one.
defaultPrompt: Set up compound engineering for this repo.
Check whether this task is ready to finish.
Record the learning from this feature.
